title: Crispy Pork Ensaïmada Croissants
description: A sweet and savory fusion of French and Spanish pastries, featuring crispy pork and flaky ensaïmada.
instructions: 2. Roll out the ensaïmada dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
3. In a small bowl, mix together the sugar and melted butter.
4. Brush the sugar mixture evenly onto the dough.
5. Sprinkle the cured pork belly on top of the dough.
6. Roll the dough into a tight log and cut it into 8-10 equal pieces.
7. Place the pieces onto a parchment-lined baking sheet.
8. Brush the tops with the beaten egg and sprinkle with salt.
9. Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
10. Remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
